case_title: VICTORIA YANG VS. GREGORY ALLEN SMITH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE OF THE DEFENDANT. REQUEST FOR A RESET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF YANG, VICTORIA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED.APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGURED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHITBIT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY YANG, VICTORIA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GREGORY ALLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED FEB-26-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, GREGORY ALLEN
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-03-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF APR-12-2011 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YANG, VICTORIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SMITH, GREGORY ALLEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
